name: rung_435_frontier_checkpoint_compound_turns
utterances: Use parent/2, sibling/2, lives_in/2, inside/2, in_region/2, carries/2, ancestor/2 for this run.
Set parent(ian, scott). Set parent(scott, dana).
assert rule ancestor(X, Y) :- parent(X, Y).
assert rule ancestor(X, Z) :- parent(X, Y), ancestor(Y, Z).
assert rule in_region(X, Z) :- lives_in(X, Y), inside(Y, Z).

utterances.utterance: ian's granddaughter is dana and they live in salem; and salem is in oregon
clarification_answers: Set lives_in(ian, salem). Set lives_in(dana, salem). Set inside(salem, oregon).

utterances.utterance: scott has a brother blake and he carries brass_key but then give that key to dana
clarification_answers: Set sibling(scott, blake). Set carries(blake, brass_key). Retract carries(blake, brass_key). Set carries(dana, brass_key).
